title: RefineResult
description: Schema for forge refine outputs (§14.3). Mirrors RefineResult in forge-agents/Reviews.scala. The `patch` field is required iff outcome == 'update_plan'.

outcome.description: Per §14.3: NoChange leaves the manifest untouched; UpdatePlan carries a ManifestPatch; ReopenDesign sends the feature back to DesignReviewing.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the chosen outcome.

patch.description: Manifest patch in §5.4 shape; required when outcome == 'update_plan', ignored otherwise.
